subject: Finance Weekly Standup Notes
content:
Thanks Nate,

I reviewed the design doc for AWS Cost Optimization. Some thoughts:

- Section 1 needs more detail on the rollback strategy
- The p99 latency numbers in Table 4 don't match what I see in the Analytics Pipeline dashboard (showing 10% vs your 13%)
- Can we add a dependency map for the Analytics Pipeline integration?
- The timeline for Legal involvement seems optimistic

Happy to discuss in our Thursday sync.

Cheers,
Olivia

subject: Re: Finance Weekly Standup Notes
content:
Hi Nate,

Thanks for flagging this. I've escalated to the Marketing team and they're looking into the API Gateway issue. Current status:

- Root cause: stale DNS cache
- Impact: ~18 users affected in North America
- ETA for fix: 12:30 CET today
- Severity: P3

I'll keep this thread updated as we learn more. Karen is the point person if you need immediate assistance.

Workaround: Clear browser cache.

Regards,
Olivia
--
Olivia Ramirez
QA Lead | Oscorp
+1-541-131-7819

subject: Re: Finance Weekly Standup Notes
content:
Hi Eve,

Just a heads up — the User Directory deployment (v6.8.21) is scheduled for Tuesday at 17:30 JST. Expected downtime is approximately 30 minutes.

Changes include:
- PR #8611: Fix rate limiting
- PR #8626: Phoenix feature flag rollout
- Config update for North America region

Please make sure your team is aware and has saved any in-progress work. We'll send a notification to #sales once complete.

Thanks,
